privileged_info_summary: The target employee name is Sarah Mitchell. The task involves updating her existing record, which initially contains the synthetic values 'Marketing', '555-123-4567', and 'sarah.mitchell@marketing.example.com' (as verified by keystrokes in the setup script). The requested new values to be entered into the database are 'Product Development', '555-867-5309', and 's.mitchell@proddev.example.com', which are verified by the application's exported database strings and the final VLM prompt.
